title: Police
description: 24/7 emergency police line. English interpretation available.
tips: Say 'I need English' — they connect you to an interpreter within seconds.

title: Fire & Ambulance
description: Fire department and ambulance. Also handles medical emergencies.
tips: State your location clearly. Google Maps can show your exact address in English.

title: Korea Travel Helpline
description: Tourist-specific helpline. Available in English, Chinese, Japanese, and more.
tips: Best first call for non-emergency travel issues: scams, lost items, complaints.

title: Emergency Medical Info
description: 24/7 medical advice and hospital guidance in multiple languages.
tips: Tells you the nearest open hospital or pharmacy at any hour.

title: Lost & Found (Police)
description: Report lost belongings or theft to the national lost property center.
tips: File a report online at Lost112.go.kr — also available in English.
